name: Pumpkin Cake Roll
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar, lemon juice, and pumpkin puree. Beat well.
2. Blend together the dry ingredients (flour, cinnamon, nutmeg, baking powder, and ginger).
3. Add the dry mixture to the wet ingredients and beat until just combined.
4. Line a cookie sheet with waxed paper and spray lightly with Pam cooking spray.
5. Pour batter onto the prepared cookie sheet in an even layer and bake at 375°F (190°C) for 15 minutes, or until set.
6. While still warm, cover the cake with a clean towel and roll it up tightly into a log shape.
7. When cool, unroll the cake and frost with the following mixture:
- 1 cup powdered sugar
- 8 ounces softened cream cheese
- 4 tablespoons butter
- 1 teaspoon vanilla extract
Mix together until smooth and spread over the unrolled cake.
8. Roll up again and refrigerate for at least a couple of hours, or until the cheese has set.
9. Slice and serve! This is a very good dessert!
